description: Pacing de producción - Plan vs Real

targets.rawSql:
WITH Start_Sec AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(erp.id), (SELECT MIN(id) FROM JAULA_ERP WHERE fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112))) AS Last_ERP_ID
    FROM JAULA_ERP erp
    INNER JOIN LOG_TABLA log ON log.NSECUENCIA = erp.secuencia AND log.FECHA_MONTAJE = erp.fecha_montaje
    WHERE log.fecha_creacion < DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND log.OK_NOK = 'OK'
),
Sec_Today AS (
    SELECT TOP 2000
        id,
        COALESCE((tpo_elevac_max + tpo_descenso_max + tpo_elev_max_scarga + tpo_desc_max_scarga)/100.0, 20.0) AS cycle_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS seq_idx
    FROM JAULA_ERP
    WHERE id >= (SELECT Last_ERP_ID + 18 FROM Start_Sec)
      AND fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112)
    ORDER BY id
),
Cumulative_Plan AS (
    SELECT
        seq_idx,
        SUM(cycle_time) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_seconds
    FROM Sec_Today
)
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(seq_idx), 0) AS [Teórico]
FROM Cumulative_Plan
WHERE DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END

SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Real]
FROM LOG_TABLA
WHERE fecha_creacion >= DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
  AND fecha_creacion <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END
  AND OK_NOK = 'OK'

WITH Start_Sec AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(erp.id), (SELECT MIN(id) FROM JAULA_ERP WHERE fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112))) AS Last_ERP_ID
    FROM JAULA_ERP erp
    INNER JOIN LOG_TABLA log ON log.NSECUENCIA = erp.secuencia AND log.FECHA_MONTAJE = erp.fecha_montaje
    WHERE log.fecha_creacion < DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND log.OK_NOK = 'OK'
),
Sec_Today AS (
    SELECT TOP 2000
        id,
        COALESCE((tpo_elevac_max + tpo_descenso_max + tpo_elev_max_scarga + tpo_desc_max_scarga)/100.0, 20.0) AS cycle_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS seq_idx
    FROM JAULA_ERP
    WHERE id >= (SELECT Last_ERP_ID + 18 FROM Start_Sec)
      AND fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112)
    ORDER BY id
),
Cumulative_Plan AS (
    SELECT
        seq_idx,
        SUM(cycle_time) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_seconds
    FROM Sec_Today
),
Teorico_Count AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(seq_idx), 0) AS teorico
    FROM Cumulative_Plan
    WHERE DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END
),
Real_Count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS real
    FROM LOG_TABLA
    WHERE fecha_creacion >= DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND fecha_creacion <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END
      AND OK_NOK = 'OK'
)
SELECT 
    r.real - t.teorico AS [Desviación]
FROM Real_Count r, Teorico_Count t

WITH Start_Sec AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(erp.id), (SELECT MIN(id) FROM JAULA_ERP WHERE fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112))) AS Last_ERP_ID
    FROM JAULA_ERP erp
    INNER JOIN LOG_TABLA log ON log.NSECUENCIA = erp.secuencia AND log.FECHA_MONTAJE = erp.fecha_montaje
    WHERE log.fecha_creacion < DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND log.OK_NOK = 'OK'
),
Sec_Today AS (
    SELECT TOP 2000
        id,
        secuencia,
        modelo,
        COALESCE((tpo_elevac_max + tpo_descenso_max + tpo_elev_max_scarga + tpo_desc_max_scarga)/100.0, 20.0) AS cycle_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS seq_idx
    FROM JAULA_ERP
    WHERE id >= (SELECT Last_ERP_ID + 18 FROM Start_Sec)
      AND fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112)
    ORDER BY id
),
Cumulative_Plan AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        secuencia,
        modelo,
        cycle_time,
        seq_idx,
        SUM(cycle_time) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_seconds
    FROM Sec_Today
)
SELECT time, [Teórico] FROM (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME)) AS time,
        0 AS [Teórico]
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) AS time,
        seq_idx AS [Teórico]
    FROM Cumulative_Plan
    WHERE DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) <= $__timeTo()
) t
ORDER BY time

SELECT time, [Real] FROM (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME)) AS time,
        0 AS [Real]
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        fecha_creacion AS time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY fecha_creacion) AS [Real]
    FROM LOG_TABLA
    WHERE fecha_creacion >= DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND fecha_creacion <= $__timeTo()
      AND OK_NOK = 'OK'
) t
ORDER BY time

panels.title: EVOLUCIÓN PLAN DE PRODUCCIÓN (PLAN vs REAL)

targets.rawSql:
WITH Latest_Log AS (
    SELECT 
        NBASTIDOR,
        FECHA_MONTAJE,
        OK_NOK,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY NBASTIDOR, FECHA_MONTAJE ORDER BY id DESC) as rn
    FROM LOG_TABLA
)
SELECT 
    j.secuencia AS [Secuencia],
    j.bastidor AS [Bastidor],
    j.modelo AS [Modelo],
    COALESCE(l.OK_NOK, 'Pendiente') AS [Estado]
FROM JAULA_ERP j
LEFT JOIN Latest_Log l ON j.bastidor = l.NBASTIDOR AND l.FECHA_MONTAJE = j.fecha_montaje AND l.rn = 1
WHERE j.fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112)
ORDER BY CAST(j.secuencia AS INT) ASC

options.content:
ℹ️ Lógica Pacing / Pacemaker de Planta

Este panel compara la producción teórica frente a la real. La lógica teórica inicia cada día a las 06:00 AM con un desfase de +18 secuencias respecto al último bastidor completado (OK) del día anterior. El avance teórico se calcula de forma acumulada según los tiempos definidos en tiempo_teorico_segundos.

Volver al Inicio

title: PLAN PRODUCCIÓN
